notes: NOTE: contrary to the task prompt's characterization of Norton2014 as 'paywalled PDF-only with no supplement text' requiring honest-gaps handling, the downloaded main PDF in this repo is a complete 10-page full-text article (Abstract through References; the R93C coding mechanism is stated explicitly, citing Kenny et al. 2012 for the original functional characterization).
